Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

TextBlock.Text: Overriding Formation Orders Using Direct Control

Run.Text: Something to note about ships in formation is that you can always override their formation orders by putting the ships into Direct Control mode.

We covered Direct Control in the first tutorial, but as a reminder, you can select any ship and hit any of the WASD keys, or right click on the ship and hit 'Assume Direct Control'. Ships under Direct Control will no longer follow the formation!
